samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_4bit">
    <description>4-bit Unsigned Number Pipeline Multiplier</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[3:0]">Multiplicand input.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[3:0]">Multiplier input.</input>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[7:0]">Product output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="size">Number of bits in the multiplier and multiplicand.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="mul_a_ext">Extend the multiplicand by adding 'size' number of zeros at the MSB.</assign>
        <assign id="mul_b_ext">Extend the multiplier by adding 'size' number of zeros at the MSB.</assign>
        <genvar i>
            <generate>
                <for start="0" end="size-1">
                    <if condition="i == 0">
                        <assign id="partial_product[0]">Partial product for bit position 0.</assign>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <assign id="partial_product[i]">Partial product for bit position i.</assign>
                    </else>
                </for>
            </generate>
        </genvar>
        <genvar j>
            <generate>
                <for start="0" end="size-1">
                    <if condition="j == 0">
                        <assign id="add_reg[0]">Register for storing the first partial product.</assign>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <assign id="add_reg[j]">Register for storing the j-th partial product.</assign>
                    </else>
                </for>
            </generate>
        </genvar>
        <assign id="final_sum">Sum of all the registers.</assign>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        Assigning extended inputs based on the size parameter.
        <assign>mul_a_ext = { {(size){1'b0}}, mul_a };</assign>
        <assign>mul_b_ext = { {(size){1'b0}}, mul_b };</assign>
        
        Generating partial products based on the multiplier's bits.
        <genvar i>
            <generate>
                <for start="0" end="size-1">
                    <if condition="i == 0">
                        <assign>partial_product[0] = mul_b_ext[i] ? mul_a_ext : 'd0;</assign>
                    </if>
                    <else>
                        <assign>partial_product[i] = mul_b_ext[i] ? (mul_a_ext << i) : 'd0;</assign>
                    </else>
                </for>
            </generate>
        </genvar>
        
        Registering partial products during the positive edge of the clock or negative edge of the reset.
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)> 
            if (~rst_n) begin
                for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) begin
                    add_reg[i] <= 0;
                end
            end else begin
                for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) begin
                    add_reg[i] <= partial_product[i];
                end
            end
        end
        
        Calculating the final sum of registered partial products during the positive edge of the clock or negative edge of the reset.
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            if (~rst_n) begin
                final_sum <= 0;
            end else begin
                final_sum <= add_reg[0] + add_reg[1] + add_reg[2] + add_reg[3]; // Add all the registers
            end
        end
        
        Assigning the final product output based on the reset signal.
        <assign>mul_out = rst_n ? final_sum : 0;</assign>
    </implementation>
</module>
